How to Use ToonBook AI

A 10 steps guide ToonBook AI

1
"AI-Powered PlatformWelcome to ToonBook ..." Dashboard looks like this.

It's very easy to navigate and everything is clear to follow through. But first thing I would do is go to the tutorial page.

https://toonbook.digisprout.live/user/dashboard
2
The tutorial page only two elements.

The invite to the training and a short tutorial video. In the tutorial page, click on this banner and book your spot for 99 percent done for your program training. Then click the video and watch the full video. This one video will show you everything about how to use the software.

https://toonbookai.live/tutorials
3
Then click AI-Tune Books.

Step number one, go to A.I. Toon Books, and then step two, write the name of your book. Then click the Next button.

https://toonbook.digisprout.live/user/ebook/add_ebook?step=1
4
Click "2 3 Upload Cover Image Only JPG, and P..."

Now you choose a file as image, and then you click Generate with AI to write your book content.

https://toonbook.digisprout.live/user/ebook/details?step=2&name=Super%20Cartoon%20Book.
5
Write a product or service description and keywords.

And you actually have to fill up both of these boxes. If you don't, then they will not work. And usually when we purchase softwares like this, we want things to happen super fast. So as a bonus, I am going to give you 100 product or service name, description, and keywords that you can start with.

https://toonbook.digisprout.live/user/ebook/details?step=2&name=Super%20Cartoon%20Book.
6
Click "Generate"

click generate and see what happens

https://toonbook.digisprout.live/user/ebook/details?step=2&name=Super%20Cartoon%20Book.
7
AI generates thus book content.

And interestingly, I got some results, which is not bad. better description and keywords would give you better results.

https://toonbook.digisprout.live/user/ebook/details?step=2&name=Super%20Cartoon%20Book.
8
Flipbook Creator.

Upload your image files from the hard drive and click Submit.

https://toonbook.digisprout.live/user/flipbook/create
9
PuzzleBook Creator.

Add a puzzle name, and then add your puzzle words. Choose grid size and difficulty, then click Submit.

https://toonbook.digisprout.live/user/puzzles/
10
Maze creator.

manually Write a name, choose grid size, and click submit.

https://toonbook.digisprout.live/user/puzzles/maze
